title: Lines Sung By Durastanti, When She Took Leave Of The English Stage.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Alexander Pope, titled "Lines Sung By Durastanti, When She Took Leave Of The English Stage.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
